description_long: This is a classic chessboard with a square playing surface divided into an 8x8 grid of alternating light and dark squares. The board is framed by a medium-width wooden border with a warm, orange-brown finish, providing a sturdy and visually appealing edge. The chessboard is set up for play, with a full set of chess pieces in two contrasting colors: white and dark brown. The pieces are arranged in their standard starting positions, with each side featuring pawns, rooks, knights, bishops, a queen, and a king. The surface of the board appears smooth and slightly glossy, reflecting light subtly. The overall construction suggests a solid wood or wood-composite build, giving it a substantial yet portable feel suitable for parks, sidewalks, or urban recreational areas.
description: A wooden chessboard with an 8x8 grid of alternating light and dark squares, bordered by a warm-toned wooden frame and set up with a full set of white and dark brown chess pieces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the chessboard with all pieces in starting positions, white pieces on the right and dark pieces on the left, highlighting the alternating square pattern and wooden border.
description_view_1: View from the white side, displaying the white pieces in the foreground and the full grid of squares, with the wooden border clearly visible.
description_view_2: Side view with both sets of pieces visible along the left and right edges, emphasizing the symmetry and the alternating square pattern.
description_view_3: View from the dark side, showing the dark pieces in the foreground and the white pieces across the board, with the wooden border framing the scene.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface features a regular checkerboard pattern of 64 squares arranged in an 8x8 grid, with alternating light beige and dark brown squares. The squares are perfectly aligned and evenly sized, creating a classic and easily recognizable chessboard appearance. The border is a solid, warm orange-brown wood, providing a clean and elegant frame around the playing area.
attribute_border_design: The border is a medium-width, solid wooden frame with a warm orange-brown finish. It is smooth, unornamented, and slightly raised above the playing surface, providing a clean and classic look without any inscriptions or decorative markings.
